title: NikoLearn Skill Graph
description: Versioned, schema-validated skill graph. Content lives here as DATA, not scattered in code. Every node carries a skill-type (drives item format); every prerequisite edge carries a human reason + strength (drives scaffolding and what we tell a child on failure). Inspired by the STRUCTURE of open skill-graphs (prereq DAG idea, not copyrightable); all text is original NikoLearn authoring (CLAUDE.md 11).

version.description: content version, bumped on every authored change

source.description: how it was authored; MUST NOT be a copy of third-party text

skill_type.description: CONCEPTUAL needs explanation, PROCEDURAL needs practice, METACOGNITIVE needs reflection. Drives item_format.

item_format.description: if present, must match the skill_type rule (see validate.mjs)

code.description: national-curriculum code when mapped; null otherwise. NEVER invent a code.

reason_ka.description: WHY from is a prerequisite of to. The most underrated asset: it tells us how to scaffold and what to say on failure.
